Storefront

Dobblin — the summer-fashion homepage

A direct-to-consumer apparel brand's storefront — built to make a shopper scroll, browse by category, and catch the sale before they bounce.

DB ARMOURS: WAVY
White wavy graphic printed tshirt

The brief

Sell the season in one scroll

Dobblin is a summer-fashion label spanning menswear, womenswear and Indian ethnic. The homepage has one job: turn a curious tap into a browse, and a browse into a basket.

The problem

A catalogue this broad — t-shirts to anarkalis — can overwhelm a first-time visitor. Without a clear path in, shoppers land, feel lost, and leave. The page needed an obvious way to shop by who you are and what you want, while still pushing the seasonal sale that drives the month's revenue.

The job

Design a homepage that opens on the sale, fans out into six clear categories, and then keeps momentum with rails of best-sellers and new arrivals — each product reading price, discount and savings at a glance. Warm, summery, and unmistakably Dobblin.

BrandDobblin · Surat
CatalogueMen · Women · Ethnic
CurrencyINR ₹
SurfaceDesktop web
The full page

The whole homepage, top to footer

Nine stacked sections, sequenced to keep a shopper moving: sale → categories → best-sellers → him/her → new arrivals → brand → product rails → new collection → join the club.

dobblin.com
↕ Scroll inside the window to walk the live page — or tap to open it full.
Section by section

Nine ways to keep scrolling

Every band has a single job and a single call to act. Here are the ones that carry the page.

The kit

One red, one outline, one card

The whole storefront runs on three moves: a single confident red, a hollow outlined display type for the loud moments, and one product card repeated everywhere it counts.

Palette

Red #E62B33
Ink #1E1614
Pink #FEF4F5
Save #2EA85F
Cream
Card #FFF
Display type — the signature
SEASON SALE
COLLECTION
ANTON · hollow outline for the loud headlines, solid for the rest

The product card

FLORAL CO-ORD SET
Pure cotton co-ord set for women
₹999₹2,99933% OFF
Now pricered · bold
MRPmuted · struck through
You savegreen · % off
Section markerred label + underline
Primary CTAsolid red
Close

Land, browse, basket

The homepage's only real metric is the next tap. Every section is built to earn it — open on the sale, make the catalogue legible in six tiles, and let one honest product card do the selling.
